sizing_rule.note: Recalculate optimal f when volatility increases by multiplying current dispersion by stretch factor (e.g., 1.6 for 60% volatility increase). Example: optimal_f becomes 0.262 under 60% volatility increase scenario. Vince parametric method.

source_rule_text: Adjust optimal f position sizing when market volatility increases, recalculating the optimal f value to maintain appropriate risk exposure under changed market conditions.
